parts.answer: Valid answers may include: Arguments for • Car sales currently make a loss so rental income could increase profit • Management can concentrate on the repair business • Considerable investment in car sales inventory can be released • Rent income will enable business to expand repair business or buy new non-current assets • Regular cash flow • Can reduce staff costs Arguments against • Costs apportioned to car sales may not be wholly saved • Complimentary service lost to customers • Less visual presence in locality/Loss of reputation • Will lose control of part of his premises √√ per valid point. Maximum two valid points for and two valid points against.
